failures.description: The ProductCatalogSearch dependency timed out, preventing the agent from retrieving the catalog evidence needed to answer the question.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent correctly understood the user goal and planned the appropriate ProductCatalogSearch call. At index 3, the tool invocation was well-formed and matched the required search constraints, but the catalog dependency returned an explicit timeout: CatalogServiceTimeoutError after 30000ms. This is an infrastructure/connectivity failure, not a schema error, guardrail block, or reasoning mistake. The failure was not resolved later; the executor and evaluator only propagated the inability to complete due to unavailable tool evidence.
